name: finance-boundary-review
description: Boundary-focused review helpers for financial mutations and API-facing changes.

interface.shortDescription: Reviews changes for validation, auth, audit, and logging risks.
interface.longDescription: Targets the repo's financial-boundary requirements: validate external inputs, avoid trusting caller identity, preserve audit events, and keep structured logging at operational boundaries.
defaultPrompt: Review this API change for financial boundary risks.
Check these files for auth, audit, and validation gaps.
Summarize missing tests for high-risk mutation paths.
